info.description: Web service that allows you to obtain a company registration certificate or the financial statements.
info.title: Visure Camerali

tags.name: Imprese Individuali
tags.description: It allows you to obtain an ordinary or historical chamber of commerce registration on an individual company

tags.name: Società di Capitale
tags.description: It allows you to obtain an ordinary or historical chamber of commerce registration on a joint stock or the financial statement document company

tags.name: Società di Persone
tags.description: It allows you to obtain an ordinary or historical chamber of commerce registration on a partnership

tags.name: Certificati Camerali
tags.description: Allows you to obtain Chamber of Commerce certificates for every type of company registered with the Chamber of Commerce

tags.name: Soci
tags.description: Allows you to obtain a document on the active members of a joint stock company or partnership

cf_piva_id.description: tax code, VAT number or ID
tax code, VAT number or ID
tax code, VAT number or ID
tax code, VAT number or ID

url.description: URL on which you want to receive the callback

field.description: field on which you want to receive the callback in post

file.description: contents of the file encoded in base64

cf_piva_id.description: tax code, VAT number or ID
tax code, VAT number or ID

anno_chiusura.description: year for which you want the company balance sheet, if not passed, the latest one available will be returned

comune.description: municipality where the company is located

codice_natura_giuridica.description: legal nature code of the company

chiamate_disponibili.description: list of endpoints available to the company

cciaa.description: Acronym of the city where the company was registered (e.g. RM as Rome, MI as Milan etc.)

numero_rea.description: Economic and Administrative Repertory number for Chamber of Commerce

cap.description: ZIP code (Italian CAP) where the company is located

codice_comune.description: Town code where the company is located

codice_comune_istat.description: Town istat code where the company is located

comune.description: Town where the company is located

frazione.description: District where the company is located

provincia.description: County (Province) where the company is located

nazione.description: Country where the company is located

ateco.description: Description of the first level ATECO Code

stato_attivita.description: indicates the status of the company according to the Italian Chamber of Commerce

data_inizio_attivita.description: start date of the company's activity

data_cessazione_attivita.description: end date of the company's activity

persona_fisica.description: whether he is a natural person or not

codice_istat_comune_nascita.description: member's town istat code of birth

descrizione_tipo_azioni.description: description of the type of shares held

get.description: With this service we can draw up a list of companies that correspond to certain parameters described below. The call returns a maximum of 1000 results even if you set a higher limit

parameters.name: denominazione
parameters.description: name of the company (you can search for parts of the name as long as they are whole words)

parameters.name: provincia
parameters.description: the code of the region you want to search in

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: to set the number of records you want to skip from the result set

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: number of results you want to receive; if not set, the call will return a maximum of 100 results

example.message: you have not passed any search parameters

get.description: Endpoint that allows a precise search via VAT number, tax code or company ID

parameters.name: cf_piva_id
parameters.description: VAT number, tax code or company ID

get.description: This method shows you the list of all your requests

post.description: Endpoint that allows you to generate a request. Starting from a VAT number or from the id of the company returning from the search, the request is accepted only if the company is a sole proprietorship

example.message: the cf_piva_id does not belong to a impresa individuale

This edpoint allows you to download the document generated by the request passed id

post.description: Endpoint that allows you to generate a request. Starting from a VAT number or from the id of the company returning from the search, the request is accepted only if the company is a joint stock company. If 'anno_chiusura' field is not passed, the system intercepts the last available balance sheet.

example.message: financial statements not available for the company

This method shows you the list of all your requests

example.message: the cf_piva_id does not belong to a societa capitale/persone/individuale
